claim_boundary: Environment contract only. It stores placeholders and secret names, never credential values, and does not unlock production claims until strict evidence artifacts pass ingestion and validation.

variables.name: WAVEMIND_ACTIVE_ACTIVE_REGIONS
variables.description: Remote WaveMind API regions for active-active namespace sync evidence.
variables.github_secret_command: printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_ACTIVE_ACTIVE_REGIONS" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_ACTIVE_ACTIVE_REGIONS --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -

variables.name: WAVEMIND_ACTIVE_ACTIVE_REGIONS_MANIFEST_JSON
variables.description: JSON manifest alternative for remote active-active region evidence.
variables.github_secret_command: printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_ACTIVE_ACTIVE_REGIONS_MANIFEST_JSON" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_ACTIVE_ACTIVE_REGIONS_MANIFEST_JSON --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -

variables.name: WAVEMIND_API_KEY
variables.description: Optional API key used when remote WaveMind endpoints require authentication.
claims: Hosted/serverless p99, cold-start, error-rate, and scale-out SLO.
Non-loopback Kubernetes service-node cluster load SLO.
variables.github_secret_command: printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_API_KEY" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_API_KEY --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -

claims: Hosted/serverless p99, cold-start, error-rate, and scale-out SLO.

claims: Hosted/serverless p99, cold-start, error-rate, and scale-out SLO.
variables.github_secret_command: printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_CLOUD_RUN_REGION" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_CLOUD_RUN_REGION --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -

variables.description: Dedicated Cloud Run service with min instances zero and external durable state.
claims: Hosted/serverless p99, cold-start, error-rate, and scale-out SLO.
variables.github_secret_command: printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_CLOUD_RUN_SERVICE" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_CLOUD_RUN_SERVICE --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -

variables.name: WAVEMIND_CLUSTER_NODES
variables.description: Remote WaveMind API nodes for the external service-node cluster workload.
claims: Non-loopback Kubernetes service-node cluster load SLO.

claims: Hosted/serverless p99, cold-start, error-rate, and scale-out SLO.

claims: 100M+ memories with measured sharded-Qdrant recall, p99, and cost SLO.
variables.github_secret_command: printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_REMOTE_SCALE_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_REMOTE_SCALE_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -

variables.description: Pinned SSH host keys for every host in the remote production lab inventory.
claims: Remote multi-region active-active convergence and physical region recovery.
variables.github_secret_command: printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_REMOTE_SSH_KNOWN_HOSTS" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_REMOTE_SSH_KNOWN_HOSTS --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -

variables.description: SSH private key used only by the remote production lab workflow.
claims: Remote multi-region active-active convergence and physical region recovery.
variables.github_secret_command: printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_REMOTE_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_REMOTE_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -

env_example:
# WaveMind strict production evidence environment
# Fill these locally or as GitHub Actions environment-scoped secrets.
# Do not commit real values.

# Remote WaveMind API regions for active-active namespace sync evidence.
WAVEMIND_ACTIVE_ACTIVE_REGIONS=us=https://wm-us.staging.example.com,eu=https://wm-eu.staging.example.com,ap=https://wm-ap.staging.example.com

# JSON manifest alternative for remote active-active region evidence.
WAVEMIND_ACTIVE_ACTIVE_REGIONS_MANIFEST_JSON={"environment":"staging","source":"kubernetes","deployment_id":"wm-regions-2026-07","regions":[{"id":"us","url":"https://wm-us.staging.example.com"},{"id":"eu","url":"https://wm-eu.staging.example.com"},{"id":"ap","url":"https://wm-ap.staging.example.com"}]}

# Optional API key used when remote WaveMind endpoints require authentication.
WAVEMIND_API_KEY=REDACTED_API_KEY

# Google Cloud project containing the dedicated managed Cloud Run evidence service.
WAVEMIND_CLOUD_RUN_PROJECT_ID=wavemind-benchmarks

# Region of the managed Cloud Run evidence service.
WAVEMIND_CLOUD_RUN_REGION=us-central1

# Dedicated Cloud Run service with min instances zero and external durable state.
WAVEMIND_CLOUD_RUN_SERVICE=wavemind-managed-evidence

# Remote WaveMind API nodes for the external service-node cluster workload.
WAVEMIND_CLUSTER_NODES=node-a=https://wm-a.staging.example.com,node-b=https://wm-b.staging.example.com,node-c=https://wm-c.staging.example.com,node-d=https://wm-d.staging.example.com

# JSON manifest alternative for external service-node cluster evidence.
WAVEMIND_CLUSTER_NODES_MANIFEST_JSON={"environment":"staging","source":"kubernetes","deployment_id":"wm-staging-2026-07","nodes":[{"id":"node-a","url":"https://wm-a.staging.example.com"},{"id":"node-b","url":"https://wm-b.staging.example.com"},{"id":"node-c","url":"https://wm-c.staging.example.com"},{"id":"node-d","url":"https://wm-d.staging.example.com"}]}

# Optional deterministic free-disk override for FAISS IVF-PQ preflight.
WAVEMIND_FAISS_IVFPQ_FREE_GB=8

# Persisted FAISS IVF-PQ index path for the 50M streaming profile.
WAVEMIND_FAISS_IVFPQ_PATH=/mnt/wavemind/faiss/wavemind-ivfpq-50m.faiss

# Least-privilege identity allowed to describe Cloud Run and read Cloud Monitoring metrics.
WAVEMIND_GCP_SERVICE_ACCOUNT=wavemind-evidence@wavemind-benchmarks.iam.gserviceaccount.com

# OIDC Workload Identity Federation provider restricted to this GitHub repository.
WAVEMIND_GCP_WORKLOAD_IDENTITY_PROVIDER=projects/123456789/locations/global/workloadIdentityPools/github/providers/wavemind

# Comma-separated PostgreSQL/pgvector service DSNs for the namespace-sharded 10M streaming load.
WAVEMIND_PGVECTOR_DSNS=postgresql://USER:PASSWORD@pgvector-a.staging.example.com:5432/wavemind,postgresql://USER:PASSWORD@pgvector-b.staging.example.com:5432/wavemind

# Optional Qdrant API key for the single-service Qdrant production load job.
WAVEMIND_QDRANT_API_KEY=REDACTED_QDRANT_API_KEY

# Optional comma-separated Qdrant API keys for sharded Qdrant production load jobs.
WAVEMIND_QDRANT_API_KEYS=REDACTED_QDRANT_API_KEY_A,REDACTED_QDRANT_API_KEY_B

# Single Qdrant service URL for 10M service-backed streaming load.
WAVEMIND_QDRANT_URL=https://qdrant-10m.staging.example.com:6333

# Comma-separated Qdrant shard URLs for 10M sharded and 100M sharded service load.
WAVEMIND_QDRANT_URLS=https://qdrant-a.staging.example.com:6333,https://qdrant-b.staging.example.com:6333

# Shared API key installed on and used to probe the remote WaveMind regions.
WAVEMIND_REMOTE_API_KEY=REDACTED_REMOTE_API_KEY

# Validated inventory for three or more independently hosted remote WaveMind regions.
WAVEMIND_REMOTE_LAB_INVENTORY_JSON={"schema":"wavemind.remote_production_lab.v1","deployment_id":"wm-regions-2026-07","environment":"staging","source":"independent-cloud-vms","image":"ghcr.io/caspiang/wavemind:sha-0123456789abcdef","regions":[{"id":"us-east","ssh_host":"wavemind-us","public_url":"https://wm-us.example.com","region":"us-east-1","zone":"us-east-1a","provider":"provider-a"},{"id":"eu-west","ssh_host":"wavemind-eu","public_url":"https://wm-eu.example.com","region":"eu-west-1","zone":"eu-west-1a","provider":"provider-b"},{"id":"ap-south","ssh_host":"wavemind-ap","public_url":"https://wm-ap.example.com","region":"ap-south-1","zone":"ap-south-1a","provider":"provider-c"}]}

# PostgreSQL password installed on each isolated remote production stack.
WAVEMIND_REMOTE_POSTGRES_PASSWORD=REDACTED_REMOTE_POSTGRES_PASSWORD

# Validated eight-host inventory for the strict remote 100M Qdrant benchmark.
WAVEMIND_REMOTE_SCALE_INVENTORY_JSON=See deploy/remote-scale/inventory.example.json

# Qdrant API key installed on private shards and used through SSH tunnels.
WAVEMIND_REMOTE_SCALE_QDRANT_API_KEY=REDACTED_REMOTE_QDRANT_API_KEY

# Pinned SSH host keys for all remote Qdrant shard hosts.
WAVEMIND_REMOTE_SCALE_SSH_KNOWN_HOSTS=wm-qdrant-0.example.com ssh-ed25519 REDACTED

# SSH private key used only by the remote Qdrant 100M workflow.
WAVEMIND_REMOTE_SCALE_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY=REDACTED_OPENSSH_PRIVATE_KEY

# Pinned SSH host keys for every host in the remote production lab inventory.
WAVEMIND_REMOTE_SSH_KNOWN_HOSTS=wm-us.example.com ssh-ed25519 REDACTED

# SSH private key used only by the remote production lab workflow.
WAVEMIND_REMOTE_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY=REDACTED_OPENSSH_PRIVATE_KEY

# Deployed serverless/managed WaveMind API nodes for remote telemetry evidence.
WAVEMIND_SERVERLESS_NODES=https://wm-serverless-a.example.com,https://wm-serverless-b.example.com

checks.name: secret_values_not_serialized
checks.detail: contract uses placeholders and secret names only
